Work: NEMA 14-50 outlet, <10 ft from panel, exposed
What it covers: Garage with panel on adjacent wall. Conduit, breaker, outlet.

Work: NEMA 14-50 outlet, finished wall, fishing required
What it covers: Drywall stays mostly closed; access holes patched.

Work: Hardwired L2 charger, 40A circuit (you supply charger)
What it covers: Most popular spec. Includes installing your charger, not buying it.
Future-proof. Pulls 4 gauge wire. Larger breaker.
Driveway-mount or exterior wall. Weather-rated disconnect, conduit.

Work: Load management device (no panel upgrade needed)
What it covers: Adder. Lets you add a charger to a near-full panel by pausing it when the dryer or AC kicks on.
Combined: panel upgrade + EV circuit. Common in homes built before 2000.
Wi-Fi setup, app pairing, power-sharing config if multiple.
